skills.name: Fire Bolt
skills.description: Launches a fire bolt at the target, dealing fire magic damage.

skills.name: Cold Bolt
skills.description: Launches a cold bolt at the target, dealing water magic damage.

skills.name: Lightning Bolt
skills.description: Launches a lightning bolt at the target, dealing wind magic damage.

skills.name: Soul Strike
skills.description: Launches multiple spirit projectiles at the target.

skills.name: Increase SP Recovery
skills.description: Permanently increases natural SP recovery speed, restoring [30 + 2% * Max SP] every 10 seconds, and when using SP Recovery items, increases the recovery amount to 150%.

skills.name: Fire Ball
skills.description: Creates a fire ball that explodes on impact, dealing area fire damage.

skills.name: Frost Driver
skills.description: Launches a freezing wave that deals water damage and may freeze enemies.

skills.name: Thunder Storm
skills.description: Summons lightning strikes in an area, dealing wind damage to multiple targets.

skills.name: Meteor Storm
skills.description: Summons meteors to rain down on an area, dealing massive fire damage over time.

skills.name: Heaven's Drive
skills.description: Summons earth pillars from the ground, dealing earth damage to enemies.

skills.name: Storm Gust
skills.description: Creates a blizzard that deals wind damage and may freeze enemies in the area.

skills.name: Lord of Vermilion
skills.description: Creates a powerful lightning storm that deals massive wind damage to all enemies.

skills.name: Quagmire
skills.description: Creates a swamp that slows enemies and reduces their AGI and DEX.

skills.name: Ganbantein
skills.description: Removes all buffs and debuffs from the target area.
